title: Upload files to Files Columns in chunks using API
excerpt:
Hello, 
We are working on a project that involves uploading large files via an API, and we would like to know if monday.com file upload API supports chunked file uploads. If they are, could someone provide guidance on ho…

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are working on a project that involves uploading large files via an API, and we would like to know if monday.com file upload API supports chunked file uploads. If they are, could someone provide guidance on how to implement this?

Thanks

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @YuvrajSingh,

As of today, this is not supported by our API.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
